title: Year 7 Mathematics: Traditional Knowledge Quiz - Authentic Assessment Experience
subject: Mathematics
culturalContext: Connecting mathematical assessment to the local environment of Mangakōtukutuku College and Ngāti Kahungunu traditions through authentic, culturally-responsive evaluation methods.
learningObjectives: Demonstrate mastery of mathematics concepts through authentic, culturally-responsive assessment
Apply traditional knowledge and modern methods to mathematics challenges
Connect assessment tasks to local environment, community, and cultural heritage
Demonstrate respect for Māori and Pacific perspectives and values
Use Te Reo Māori appropriately in mathematics assessment contexts
activities: Traditional knowledge workshop and mathematics integration
Community interview project on mathematics applications
Cultural artifact study through mathematics lens
resources: Local kaumātua for traditional measurement knowledge
Cultural measurement references and traditional methods
Community statistics and local economic data
assessment: Sustainability solution design with mathematics principles
nzcAlignment: Mathematics and Statistics: Number and Algebra (Level 4-5)
Mathematics and Statistics: Geometry and Measurement (Level 4-5)
Te Tiriti o Waitangi: Kaitiakitanga and environmental stewardship

assessmentTasks.title: Whakawhanaungatanga: Building Assessment Context
assessmentTasks.description: Begin with karakia and establish cultural protocols. Students reflect on their learning journey, prior knowledge, and personal connections to the assessment topic. Set clear expectations and cultural guidelines.

assessmentTasks.title: Cultural Context and Authentic Application
assessmentTasks.description: Students will demonstrate mathematical understanding through solving real-world problems connected to local landmarks, environmental data, and cultural significance using both traditional and modern mathematical approaches.
materials: Local kaumātua for traditional measurement knowledge

assessmentTasks.title: Research and Development Phase
assessmentTasks.description: Students engage in deep research and development of their mathematics assessment project, incorporating both traditional and modern approaches while maintaining cultural authenticity.
materials: Cultural measurement references and traditional methods
Community statistics and local economic data

assessmentTasks.title: Presentation and Cultural Sharing
assessmentTasks.description: Students present their assessment work to peers, teachers, and community members, demonstrating both academic achievement and cultural understanding through respectful sharing and celebration.

assessmentCriteria.culturalAuthenticity: Demonstrates genuine respect for and understanding of Māori and Pacific perspectives
assessmentCriteria.academicRigor: Shows mastery of subject-specific knowledge and skills at appropriate year level
assessmentCriteria.communityConnection: Clearly connects learning to local community, environment, and cultural context
assessmentCriteria.communication: Effectively communicates ideas using appropriate language and cultural protocols
assessmentCriteria.innovation: Demonstrates creativity and problem-solving in addressing authentic challenges

differentiation.support: Provide additional scaffolding, visual aids, and one-on-one support for students who need extra help
differentiation.extension: Offer advanced challenges, independent research opportunities, and leadership roles for students who excel
differentiation.cultural: Ensure all students can connect to their own cultural backgrounds while learning about Māori perspectives

assessmentTools.rubrics: Detailed rubrics aligned with NZC achievement objectives and cultural competencies
assessmentTools.portfolios: Comprehensive portfolios documenting learning journey and cultural connections
assessmentTools.presentations: Oral presentations incorporating cultural protocols and community sharing
assessmentTools.reflections: Regular reflection journals connecting learning to cultural values and community needs
